overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City. The player moves from a commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and digital billboards through industrial backstreets beneath elevated highways, crossing intersections with views of the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard with palm trees and digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the commercial sidewalk, passing bus stops and digital billboards

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the commercial street, iconic to the cityscape
large vertical digital advertising screens displaying product advertisements
multi-story commercial structures with glass and neon facades
covered bus stop with digital advertising displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and towering digital billboards. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk past a bus stop shelter, with commercial buildings rising on the left and the street extending into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: moving under the elevated highway structure into a shaded industrial zone

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass, transitioning from commercial to industrial district

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction under the overpass

entered.detail: massive steel and concrete elevated highway with support pillars
large industrial building with corrugated metal siding and loading docks
orange corporate signage for Kiroshi visible on building facade
pedestrian or utility bridge connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered industrial area beneath an elevated highway. Metal support pillars and overhead walkways dominate the space, while a Kiroshi sign marks the shift from commercial to industrial architecture. The lighting becomes dappled as the camera moves through shadows cast by the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial backstreet with water towers and utility infrastructure

events.description: turning right at the intersection onto the industrial street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and continuing down the industrial street

entered.detail: large spherical water storage tank on industrial building roof
metal security fencing along the sidewalk perimeter
red and white striped construction barriers lining the road

segments.scene_description: Turning right onto a narrow industrial street, the camera passes large water towers and metal staircases attached to warehouse buildings. Chain-link fences and construction barriers line the path as the camera continues through the utilitarian backstreets.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with downtown skyline view

events.description: crossing the street at a green traffic light
emerging from enclosed industrial streets into open intersection with city skyline

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while vehicles pass by, heading toward the downtown skyline

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: distant downtown skyscrapers visible against the bright morning sun
curved on-ramp structure for the elevated highway system
tall advertising billboard with digital display facing the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide, sun-drenched intersection with views of the distant downtown skyline. Crossing the street at a green light, the scene features passing vehicles, construction barriers, and massive billboards silhouetted against the bright morning sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with construction barriers and utility poles

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial sidewalk past construction barriers and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall wooden utility pole with multiple power lines
tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along an industrial sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and construction barriers. The camera passes utility poles and cardboard debris scattered on the concrete, with a modern glass building visible in the distance and a pedestrian walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright commercial boulevard into the gritty industrial underbelly of the city before emerging back into the open morning light. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk lined with palm trees and towering digital billboards, moving past a bus stop shelter as commercial buildings rise on the left. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a semi-covered industrial zone beneath an elevated highway, where the lighting becomes dappled under metal support pillars and a Kiroshi sign. The path then turns right into narrow backstreets characterized by water towers, metal staircases, and chain-link fences before finally opening up into a wide, sun-drenched intersection with views of the distant downtown skyline. The movement concludes along an industrial sidewalk featuring graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris, heading toward a modern glass building in the distance.
